prompt: Transform the interface layout to mimic a transparent augmented reality display.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Transform the Photoshop user interface elements into a transparent augmented reality display. Make all visible UI components, including the top menu bar, the left-side toolbar, the top options bar, and the right-side panels (Color, Swatches, Layers), appear semi-transparent and give them a futuristic, holographic glow. Ensure the main image content of the dog remains completely unchanged.
objects: main image content of the dog
top Photoshop menu bar, semi-transparent with holographic glow
left-side Photoshop toolbar, semi-transparent with holographic glow
top Photoshop options bar, semi-transparent with holographic glow
right-side Photoshop Color panel, semi-transparent with holographic glow
right-side Photoshop Swatches panel, semi-transparent with holographic glow
right-side Photoshop Layers panel, semi-transparent with holographic glow
